creator: Andre.Albsmeier@mchp.siemens.de
text:
When using arpwatch the report emails are sent to root normally.
Currently you can't specify another or multiple persons as
recipient.

Fix: The following patch introduces the -m flag. Now you can specify a
different recipient which gets the report emails instead of root.
For multiple persons who should receive the reports you can create
an alias for sendmail.
The manpages have been changed as well.
How-To-Repeat: 
Use arpwatch and look for a possibility to send the reporting
emails to other persons.
